name: @bnomei/emdash-bento
description: Bento grid field widget for EmDash JSON fields, using Block Builder for nested blocks.
author: Bruno Meilick <b@bnomei.com> (https://bnomei.com)

scripts.test: rm -rf .test-dist && tsc --ignoreConfig --module NodeNext --moduleResolution NodeNext --target ES2022 --types node --skipLibCheck --outDir .test-dist src/layout.test.ts && node --test .test-dist/layout.test.js test/admin-empty-layout.test.mjs
scripts.build: vp pack src/index.ts src/admin.tsx --format esm --dts --clean --tsconfig tsconfig.json
scripts.pack:check: vp pack src/index.ts src/admin.tsx --format esm --dts --clean --tsconfig tsconfig.json --publint
scripts.prepublishOnly: npm run check && npm run typecheck && npm run pack:check && npm run types:check
